experiences.title: International Account Manager
experiences.description:
- Assisting the Managing Director in the daily operations.
- Assist in promoting the Mediakeys products & services.
- Providing the strategy, negotiation and execution of all media.

experiences.title: ITES Marketing Intern
experiences.description:
Collaborate with the Marketing Manager for Spain & Italy to support the concepts and prioritize the development of user growth in the Spanish and Italian territory.
- Collaborate in content creation and translation.
- Assist and support the work creating new Marketing campaigns and event management.
- Support the acquisition of new marketing/sales partnerships.
- Create ideas and concepts to attract new users and propose messages for emails and app messages.

experiences.title: Marketing Internship
experiences.description:
Participated within a project of  E-Commerce replatforming of a global brand in the luxury industry. 
Worked on the new frontend of the website along with the configuration of a functional CMS system based on customer’s needs.
Also developed knowledge in the field of UX, functional analysis, testing and on the CMS technology.

experiences.title: Summer Internship
experiences.description:
Participated in market research, analysis and planning on PWC’s ongoing projects.
Worked and delivered branded PowerPoint presentations resulting in an increase in data analytics and design skills.

experiences.title: Internship - Administration department for a school project

education.description: Graduated with the thesis “The Reshoring Phenomenon : a potential opportunity”. Core Modules : Mathematics, Statistics, Accounting, Microeconomics, Macroeconomics, Law and Economics, Information System, Corporate Finance, Games and Strategies, IO and Competition Theory, Management, Entrepreneurship, International Economics.

French Baccalaureate in Economics and Business and Social Sciences with specialization in Mathematics A level equivalent : AAA Other major subjects : ESABAC (blending French Baccalaureate and Italian “Esame di Stato”) Final year Dissertation : What would be the socio-political consequences of a wider internet access in Cuba?
Completed an Academic International Relations summer course at Oxford University

accomplishment_projects.title: Organizational Skills - School Representative
accomplishment_projects.description: Class representative, speaking for the class in the school board for 3 years in a row. Student representative “Conseil De la Vie Lycéenne” directly reporting and working with the school principal with the objective of increasing overall student satisfaction with the institution and faculty. Increased my public speaking, organizational and problem-solving skills.

accomplishment_projects.title: Public Speaking - HMUN
accomplishment_projects.description: Selected as a main speaker for a simulation of the United Nations committee. Refined techniques in researching, debating and developing critical thinking together with team working.

volunteer_work.title: Responsabile raccolta fondi
volunteer_work.description: Involved in various fundraising and volunteering events including sports and artistic activities.

volunteer_work.title: Volunteer Staff
volunteer_work.company: Action Against Hunger / Action contre la Faim Canada
